zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Stanley於1444年出生在英國斯塔福爾艾爾福德時，她的父親John Stanley21歲，母親Elizabeth Vernon20歲。她於1472年與Sir John de Ferrers在英國哈普爾素坦普頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1477年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾塔沃斯享年33歲。

nameMeanings.name: Stanley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Stanley, including those in Yorkshire, Staffordshire, Derbyshire, Durham, Gloucestershire, and Wiltshire, named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This English name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was Gaelicized as de Stainléigh.

English: possibly also a variant of Stoneley, a habitational name from Stoneley Green in Burland (Cheshire), Stoneleigh (Warwickshire), or Stonely in Kimbolton (Huntingdonshire), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of any of various like-sounding names in other languages, for example Polish Stanislawski , Greek Anastasiou , and Serbian Stojadinov (patronymic from the personal name Stojadin).

variants.name: Stanislawski
meanings: Polish (Stanisławski): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Stanisław, Stanisławów, or Stanisławice, named with the personal name Stanisław (see Stanislav ).

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Stanley was born in 1444, in Elford, Staffordshire, England, her father, John Stanley, was 21 and her mother, Elizabeth Vernon, was 20. She married Sir John de Ferrers in 1472, in Southampton, Hampshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1477, in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud Stanley est née en 1444, à Elford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Stanley, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Vernon, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John de Ferrers en 1472, à Southampton, Hampshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1477, à Tamworth, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 33 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Maud Stanley(이)가 1444년 영국 스태퍼드실르 엘퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Stanley(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Vernon(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1472년 영국 함프실르 소우섬프턴에서 Sir John de Ferrers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1477년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 타워스에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Stanley родилась в 1444 г. в местности элфорд, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Stanley было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Vernon, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John de Ferrers в 1472 г. в местности соутамптон, хампшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1477 г. в местности тамворт, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 33 лет.
